message:
Fix version mismatch in marketplace.json (closes #8)

Update plugin version from 1.0.5 to 1.0.6 to match the latest git release tag.
This resolves the issue where Claude Code would show v1.0.5 after updating
to v1.0.6, ensuring version consistency between git tags and plugin metadata.

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
     {
       "name": "episodic-memory",
       "description": "Semantic search for Claude Code conversations. Remember past discussions, decisions, and patterns.",
-      "version": "1.0.5",
+      "version": "1.0.6",
       "source": "./",
       "author": {
         "name": "Jesse Vincent",
